findingDetails.title: Validator checks only 12 v2 sections but format spec requires sections 6.5, 11, and 12 as core
HTML footer in report-gen.ts still contains original project name "design-md-generator"
"17-section" count is repeated across all docs but does not match the format spec or the validator

title: Validator checks only 12 v2 sections but format spec requires sections 6.5, 11, and 12 as core
evidence: validate.ts checkSectionCompleteness lists 12 v2 sections (0-10, 13). It is missing `## 6.5. Motion System`, `## 11. State Matrix`, and `## 12. Iconography` — all three are marked REQUIRED in design-md-format.md lines 43-50. The validator will pass a DESIGN.md that omits these three required sections.
recommendation: Add `## 6.5. Motion System`, `## 11. State Matrix`, and `## 12. Iconography` to the v2Sections array in validate.ts:214-226.

title: HTML footer in report-gen.ts still contains original project name "design-md-generator"
evidence: Line 621: `<footer class="footer">design-md-generator · ...</footer>`. Similarly proof.ts line 288: `Generated by design-md-generator proof · ...`. These are the original open-source project name and should have been removed during de-attribution.
recommendation: Replace with "sk-design-md-generator" or a neutral identity label consistent with the tool's current name in package.json ("design-system-extractor").

title: "17-section" count is repeated across all docs but does not match the format spec or the validator
evidence: SKILL.md (line 3, 12, etc.), README (line 4, 14, 26, 73, 203), extraction_workflow.md (line 55), cardinal_rules_card.md (line 42), and troubleshooting.md all say "17-section." But design-md-format.md lines 31-53 define 14 numbered core (0-13) + 1 half (6.5) + 4 optional (14-17) = up to 19 sections. The validator only checks 12. No single count reconciles the docs.
recommendation: Pick a consistent section count that matches the format spec (e.g. "14-section core format" or "18-section v2 format"), update all doc occurrences, and align validate.ts to enforce the same required set defined by design-md-format.md.
